title: Natural Language Git
description: Manipulate git in natural language directly from the interface

command.label: Git Command
command.placeholder: Ex: Undo my last 3 commits, show what changed since Monday, create a branch from the last stable tag...
command.examples: Examples: "show changes", "undo last commit", "create branch feature-x", "switch to main", "merge branch dev", "push to origin"

errors.noProject: Please select a project to use this feature
